finding_results.evidence: At the reception, only Art Pollard (chapters/chapter_07.md:73) retains the full physical-description-then-interpretive-gloss template — introduced partly through dialogue ('announced, half-standing') so the template is already partially broken. Restructured introductions: barefoot woman (chapters/chapter_07.md:71) — action only, interpretive tag 'Dan found this unreasonably comforting — a body asserting its own comfort in a room designed by machines' removed, image speaks for itself. Bartender (chapters/chapter_07.md:89) — physical details plus action ('poured generously and without comment'), interpretive gloss 'the universal language of a bartender who understood' removed. Liaison (chapters/chapter_07.md:113) — compressed from individual portrait to type-aggregate ('not Lena Morse but the same species, gray suit, laser part, smile that was technically a smile'). Banana-couple woman (chapters/chapter_07.md:115) — interpretive tag 'which Dan respected' removed, introduced through her dialogue about bananas. 1 of 5 reception characters follows the template; 4 introduced through action, dialogue, type-aggregate, or physical detail without psychology reading.
finding_results.notes: Anna Petrova (line 31) retains her full portrait but is introduced pre-reception in the apartment scene, not at the Carlisle. Sheila Pollard (line 83) was already introduced through dialogue and voice description, not the physical-then-gloss template.

finding_results.evidence: Hallway distance ranking cut at chapters/chapter_07.md:275 — 'The six feet between them were the most consequential distance in the building, more charged than the inch in the car, because the car was outside and this was inside' removed; line now reads 'They stood in the hallway. Six feet apart. Still in their good clothes, in the apartment where their son slept with one sock on.' Door-gap gloss cut at chapters/chapter_07.md:283 — 'closing the door would be a statement, leaving it open would be an invitation, and the inch between was the exact width of everything they hadn't said' removed; 'Not closed. Almost closed.' communicates without interpretation. Mutual-knowledge gloss also cut ('this mutual knowledge was a kind of intimacy that was worse than a kiss because it had no resolution'). Omniscient knowledge trimmed at chapters/chapter_07.md:291 — 'she knew he was thinking about the same inch she was thinking about' removed; Mira's inference stops at 'she knew he wasn't sleeping.' Thematic summary paragraph cut entirely (former line 297, 'The apartment was a node. The apartment was a home...' through 'letting the machines claim the fire'). Final paragraph trimmed at chapters/chapter_07.md:297 — analytical tail ('the distance between them was worse... It was chosen. It was chosen and it was wrong') removed. Chapter now ends: 'The stove light hummed. Somewhere on the second floor, a door opened and closed. The building settled around them, and they lay in their separate rooms in their good clothes and did not sleep.' Final 20 lines contain no sentences interpreting symbolic meaning of rendered images. Chapter ends on concrete image and sensation.
finding_results.notes: Preserved all embodied/sensory material in the final pages: Mira's phantom proximity (line 289), perfume on Dan's jacket (line 287), the stove light detail (line 297), refrigerator click (line 293). Cut only analytical apparatus and thematic restatement. The closing image — building settling, two people in good clothes not sleeping — carries the chapter's emotional weight without narrating its meaning.

pass_summaries.summary: Fallback revision report generated after validation failure.

All three findings addressed. (1) 'The way' reduced from 22 to 8 instances, no two within 15 lines, using 7+ distinct syntactic replacement strategies; retained instances are character-specific or structurally essential. (2) Reception character introductions diversified: 4 of 5 now use action, dialogue, type-aggregate, or unglossed physical detail instead of the description-then-psychology template. (3) Chapter ending stripped of analytical apparatus — hallway-distance ranking, door-gap interpretation, mutual-knowledge gloss, and two thematic-summary paragraphs all cut; chapter now ends on concrete image (building sounds, bodies in good clothes, sleeplessness). No sanitization introduced; the almost-kiss scene, desire rendering, and all intimate/difficult material preserved at full specificity. Heading contract maintained. Dialogue contraction levels verified against style bible (Dan: high, Mira: moderate). No style-bible example lines appear in the draft.
